queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a formal savings account on credit default probability and risk mitigation.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical study on how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating effects associated with maintaining minimal savings balances below 100 DM.
